benefits.description: Lost 40 lbs on Retatrutide over approximately 3 years; eventually moved to lower maintenance dose
Appetite suppression was highly effective prior to Cymbalta introduction

side_effects.description: After starting Cymbalta 3 months ago, Retatrutide no longer suppresses appetite; eating more than usual
Weight gain of +7 lbs in 3 months since starting Cymbalta, despite doubling Retatrutide dosage

protocol_notes: User has been on Retatrutide for 3 years with good results. Cymbalta (antidepressant) introduced 3 months ago. Doubled Reta dosage since Cymbalta introduction with no improvement in appetite suppression. Believes Cymbalta may be blocking GLP-1 effects.
